sentence_reviews.text: Cryptographic signatures and append-only logs authenticate artifacts, requests, model versions, and lineage events while making unauthorized modification detectable.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: C2PA supports cryptographic signing and provenance assertions for content; DDIA supports logs/immutability concepts. Requests and model versions are extrapolated.
sentence_reviews.notes: Good conceptual support, but not exact artifact/request/model-version coverage.

sentence_reviews.text: They provide an integrity substrate for provenance, audit, and controlled agent execution.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: C2PA supports provenance/integrity; DDIA supports audit/logging concepts. Controlled agent execution is indirect.
sentence_reviews.notes: Provenance and audit are supported; agent execution should be sourced separately.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: C2PA supports signed manifests/assertions generally, but not model manifests specifically.
sentence_reviews.notes: Plausible extension of signed content manifests to model artifacts.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sources support logs and cryptographic integrity concepts; hash-chained trace logs are not directly cited.
C2PA supports provenance assertions/signing for content artifacts.
sentence_reviews.notes: The packet source supports the general concept; exact term attestation may need a supply-chain security source.

sentence_reviews.text: Keys, identities, and trust roots must be managed securely, and signed data can still be false at creation time.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: C2PA relies on signing, identity, and trust infrastructure; signatures authenticate provenance but do not guarantee semantic truth.
sentence_reviews.notes: Defensible security limitation, though exact phrasing is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Cryptographic signing & tamper-evident logs has an `operationalizes` dependency on Distributed systems & networking because Distributed systems & networking is modeled as infrastructure needed to operationalize the node.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning/dependency claim, not an external-world necessity claim.
